lines.speaker: Angelus
lines.line: No weapons, no friends, no hope. Take all that away, and what's left?

lines.speaker: Buffy
lines.line: Me.

lines.speaker: Spike
lines.line: You're not friends. You'll never be friends. You'll be in love till it kills you both. You'll fight, and you'll shag, and you'll hate each other till it makes you quiver, but you'll never be friends.

lines.speaker: Spike
lines.line: Love isn't brains, children, it's blood — blood screaming inside you to work its will.

lines.speaker: Giles
lines.line: You were destined to fight the Master. It says so in the Codex.

lines.speaker: Buffy
lines.line: I quit.

lines.speaker: Giles
lines.line: I beg your pardon?

lines.speaker: Buffy
lines.line: I resign. I'm fired. You can find someone else to stop the Master from taking over.

lines.speaker: Giles
lines.line: I'm afraid that's not possible.

lines.speaker: Buffy
lines.line: Then find someone who doesn't have a social life. Me, I'm going.

lines.speaker: Buffy
lines.line: Dawn, listen to me. I love you. I will always love you. But this is the work that I have to do.

lines.speaker: Buffy
lines.line: Tell Giles I... I figured it out. And I'm okay.

lines.speaker: Buffy
lines.line: The hardest thing in this world is to live in it.

lines.speaker: Buffy
lines.line: Be brave. Live.

lines.speaker: Buffy
lines.line: I told him... I thought it didn't matter. That he was different, that the curse was over.

lines.speaker: Giles
lines.line: It's not your fault.

lines.speaker: Buffy
lines.line: I was stupid.

lines.speaker: Giles
lines.line: You were in love. It's a mitigating circumstance. Trust me, I've seen it before.

lines.speaker: Willow
lines.line: Bored now.

lines.speaker: Giles
lines.line: I've been waiting. I know who you are, of course.

lines.speaker: Buffy
lines.line: Good. Then you know I'm the one girl in all the world who would really rather not spend a Friday night in a library.

lines.speaker: Giles
lines.line: Fate rarely calls upon us at a moment of our choosing.

lines.speaker: Buffy
lines.line: So you're my watcher?

lines.speaker: Giles
lines.line: I have that... burden, yes.

lines.speaker: Buffy
lines.line: Are you okay?

lines.speaker: Faith
lines.line: Five by five.

lines.speaker: Buffy
lines.line: What does that even mean?

lines.speaker: Faith
lines.line: It means I'm good. Wicked good. Living the dream.

lines.speaker: Oz
lines.line: I'm gonna ask you to go out with me tomorrow night. And I'm kinda nervous about it, actually. It's interesting.

lines.speaker: Willow
lines.line: Oh. I'm going to say yes!

lines.speaker: Oz
lines.line: Yeah, I thought you might.

lines.speaker: Anya
lines.line: For a thousand years I wielded the power of the Wish. I brought ruin to the heads of unfaithful men.

lines.speaker: Xander
lines.line: Well, hey. That's swell.

lines.speaker: Anya
lines.line: I was incredible.

lines.speaker: Willow
lines.line: So, we can talk again. That's good, right?

lines.speaker: Buffy
lines.line: Yeah. Although... some things are easier to say without words.

lines.speaker: Willow
lines.line: What does that mean?

lines.speaker: Buffy
lines.line: I'm not sure. But Giles made a very convincing mime.

lines.speaker: Drusilla
lines.line: My stars are singing to me, Spike. Can you hear them?

lines.speaker: Spike
lines.line: I hear them, love. Always.

lines.speaker: Drusilla
lines.line: They say a new age is coming. Something old is waking up.

lines.speaker: Spike
lines.line: Then we'll be ready for it.
